scope: Decide the next owner-rank MoE VJP optimization branch for the retained TorchTitan DeepSeek-V4-style MI350 canary.

retained_canary_context.retained_moe_path: MORI dispatch/combine, AITER fused_moe forward, routed padded PyTorch owner-rank VJP backward, Triton SwiGLU, registered backward combine, CE2

backward_recomputes: W1/W3 forward GEMMs to rebuild gate/up
W2 forward GEMM to rebuild unweighted expert output for dTopkWeight

aiter_public_forward_contract.public_fused_moe_return: single final moe output tensor only
aiter_public_forward_contract.two_stage_a2_semantics: post-activation hidden, equivalent to silu(gate) * up for the separated Silu/SwiGLU path
missing_for_training_backward: unweighted compact expert output for dTopkWeight

standalone_owner_rank_ep8_probe.read: Saving only AITER stage1/post-SwiGLU hidden is effectively neutral because backward still recomputes gate/up for SwiGLU backward and still needs unweighted output for dTopkWeight. The useful saved-state contract must include gate/up or a fused backward that recomputes gate/up internally once and reuses the result across dgrad, wgrad, and xgrad.

do_not_lead_with: TorchTitan-side save of only AITER stage1/post-SwiGLU hidden
another dispatch/pack-only cleanup as the main MoE branch
AITER public fused_moe forward substitution without a training backward contract
lead_branch: Define an AITER/CK training backward contract that exposes or preserves gate, up, post-SwiGLU hidden, and optionally unweighted compact expert output.
Or implement a fused compact grouped training-GEMM owner VJP that recomputes gate/up once internally and reuses them for W2 dgrad, SwiGLU backward, W1/W3 wgrad, and W1/W3 xgrad/reduce.
Keep the current routed padded PyTorch VJP as the correctness oracle for gradients and route semantics.
first_validation_gate: Standalone EP8 owner-rank VJP parity against current PyTorch VJP at the real receive-count distribution.
Compare retained 6.58 ms local VJP against the new kernel/contract; useful promotion should beat the public stage1-plus-output 5.86 ms point and approach the ideal gate/up/hidden 5.39 ms or better.
Then run the 4xMI350 S4096 GBS64 and 8xMI350 S4096 GBS128 canaries with the same CE2 retained shape and re-rank MORI tail sidecars.

bottom_line: The next MoE optimization is not a public AITER forward-intermediate toggle. It needs a training backward contract or fused owner-rank grouped-GEMM VJP that attacks recompute plus wgrad plus xgrad/reduce, because those are about 75% of the EP8 owner-VJP tail.
